text: The Clipboard API (`navigator.clipboard`) provides asynchronous read/write access to the system clipboard from web pages. It replaces `document.execCommand('copy')` with a Promise-based, secure (requires Permissions API) approach supporting text, HTML, images (PNG/SVG), and custom formats.
Clipboard access must be triggered by user gesture (click, keypress).
The Permissions API controls read access: `navigator.permissions.query({ name: 'clipboard-read' })`.
